name: design-for-ai
description: A design-foundations system with a four-stage workflow (research → plan → mock → build) and nine auto-triggering pillar skills. The workflow commands take any design idea from brief to viewable artifact: research extracts the brief, plan decomposes it into phased stages with pillar assignments and done-when criteria, mock renders a cheap prototype and gates on user sign-off, build executes the plan with per-phase BUILD → REVIEW → commit dispatch. Nine pillar skills cover the design landscape and are also directly invocable: core visual/surface, usability, content-design, data-viz, deceptive-patterns, behavioral, journey, design-systems, and ai-native.
